## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX to discuss performance metrics, content progress, and ongoing workflow improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Performance metrics remain strong despite slight dips; pages moving closer to top search results (avg. position 9.95)](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Medium workflow automation nearly complete; final image creation step being resolved](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [New "Ask AI" button on Strapi website may be impacting event click metrics (\~500 AI prompt questions)](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [GrowthX integration pages showing highest traffic increase and positive engagement rates](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)

## Topics

### Performance Metrics

  - [Overall sessions consistent with slight dip; still second-highest figures in last year](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Non-branded impressions declined slightly (attributed to Google algorithm changes)](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [URL clicks increased by 11%, average SERP position improved to 9.95](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Conversion events declined (8,000+ vs. 9,000+ last week), but demo submissions consistent](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [Top-of-funnel activity dipped, middle-to-bottom funnel actions remain steady](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)

### Content Progress

  - [2 pages refreshed, 5 scheduled for upcoming week](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [9 articles delivered last week, 7 scheduled for this week](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [GrowthX integration pages saw highest traffic increase, followed by tutorials and headless CMS](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)

### Workflow Improvements

  - [Medium automation: Can now generate screenshots of tables from Strapi articles](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Action Item Database created (link to be updated)](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [GrowthX to test automation for staging articles to Strapi CMS this week](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Discussed ImageGen workflow and metadata updates for integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)

### Medium Workflow Automation

  - [Final step: resolving image creation and markdown rendering issues](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [Theo to review drafts and provide feedback on formatting](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [Challenge: Medium's proprietary markdown format requires conversion step](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)

### Strapi Website Update

  - [New "Ask AI" button added to all pages (\~500 questions received)](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [May impact event click metrics due to additional CTA](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)

### Image Request Process

  - [Mara logged request with Strapi's designer](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Suggested starting with 1-3 images to test workflow before scaling up](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [Deadline set for next Tuesday to discuss during next sync](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Theo to review Medium drafts and provide feedback on formatting issues](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [Mara to share updated link for Action Item Database](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Mara to pull specific URLs for top-performing integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [Mara to share updated TLDR on Scrunch for brand visibility tracking](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [Await response from Notum team regarding preview function issue](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [Review designer's image creations in next week's sync](https://fathom.video/share/vAyznSgsqUNAH2zescqiFGxHPDxnwwaT?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
